mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `user` WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `user` WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND role = 'STUDENT' AND deleted = 0

SELECT * FROM `user` WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND role = #{role} AND deleted = 0 AND (last_active_at IS NULL OR last_active_at < #{beforeTime}) ORDER BY (last_active_at IS NULL) DESC, last_active_at ASC
